nasb.text: Shepherd Your people with Your scepter, The flock of Your possession Which dwells by itself in the woodland, In the midst of a fruitful field. Let them feed in Bashan and Gilead As in the days of old.

esv.text: Shepherd your people with your staff, the flock of your inheritance, who dwell alone in a forest in the midst of a garden land; let them graze in Bashan and Gilead as in the days of old.

cnv.text: 求你用你的杖牧放你的子民， 就是你產業的羊群， 他們安然獨居在樹林裡， 在佳美的田園中； 願他們在巴珊和基列得著牧養， 像古時一樣。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 求你用你的杖牧放属于你的羊群， 就是你的子民。 他们独自居住在丛林中， 住在肥沃的田园间。 愿他们像从前一样在巴珊和基列吃草。
